description: Modify the base plate in /opt/solvespace_samples/base.slvs by adding a NEMA 17 stepper motor mounting pattern centered on the origin of the large flat top face. The pattern must consist of a 22.2 mm diameter center hole and four 3.2 mm diameter mounting holes arranged in a square with a 31.04 mm center-to-center distance (15.52 mm offset from the origin). Extrude these holes as a cut through the plate. Save the modified project to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_base.slvs and export the 3D model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_base.stl.
